meta.title: 饮食文化
meta.description: Intermediate food culture vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: ingredients, regional cuisines, and cooking.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급~중급 음식 문화 어휘와 문형: 식재료, 지방 요리, 조리법.

explanation.en: 「色香味俱全」means a dish is excellent in color, aroma, and taste all at once.
explanation.ko: 「色香味俱全」는 색·향·맛이 모두 뛰어난 요리를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「色香味俱全」是什么意思？(What does 色香味俱全 mean?)
choices: 色香味俱全(perfect in color, aroma, and taste)

questions.prompt: 「食材」是什么意思？(What does 食材 mean?)
「烹饪」是什么意思？(What does 烹饪 mean?)

explanation.ko: 「地方菜系」(dìfāng càixì)는 '지방 요리 계통'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「地方菜系」是什么意思？(What does 地方菜系 mean?)
「饮食习惯」是什么意思？(What does 饮食习惯 mean?)

explanation.en: 「色香味俱全」means excellent in color, aroma, and taste.
explanation.ko: 「色香味俱全」는 색·향·맛이 모두 뛰어남을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 这道菜___，让人一看就有食欲。(This dish is excellent in color, aroma, and taste, makes you hungry just looking at it.)
做这道菜需要新鲜的___，比如西红柿和鸡蛋。(Making this dish requires fresh ingredients, such as tomatoes and eggs.)
我妈妈的___手艺非常好，做的菜都很好吃。(My mom's cooking skill is very good, everything she makes is delicious.)
四川菜是中国八大___之一，以辣闻名。(Sichuan cuisine is one of China's eight great regional cuisines, famous for its spiciness.)
南方人和北方人的___有很大不同，比如主食就不一样。(Southern and northern Chinese people's eating habits are very different, for example the staple food is different.)
这道菜的做法___，只需要三个步骤就能完成。(This dish's method is simple, only needs three steps to complete.)
虽然这道菜看起来简单，___做起来却很讲究火候。(Although this dish looks simple, making it actually requires careful attention to cooking heat/timing.)
这家餐厅不但味道好，___价格也很实惠。(This restaurant not only tastes good, but also has affordable prices.)
只有掌握了正确的火候，___能做出美味的菜肴。(Only by mastering the right cooking heat can you make delicious dishes.)

explanation.en: 「是〜的」emphasizes the manner: 是用祖传秘方做出来的 = "made using a secret family recipe".

questions.prompt: 这道菜的味道是___祖传秘方做出来___的。(This dish's flavor was made using a secret family recipe passed down through generations.)
这家餐厅的招牌菜___了当地特色食材，非常受欢迎。(This restaurant's signature dish uses local specialty ingredients, very popular.)

explanation.en: 「源远流长」(yuányuǎn liúcháng) is an idiom meaning "having a long history and deep roots".
explanation.ko: 「源远流长」(yuányuǎn liúcháng)는 역사가 유구하고 뿌리가 깊다는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 中国的饮食文化___历史悠久，博大精深。(China's food culture has a long history, broad and profound.)
这道菜的调味非常___，甜辣适中。(This dish's seasoning is very well-balanced, sweet and spicy in moderation.)
很多外国游客来中国旅游，最喜欢___当地美食。(Many foreign tourists come to China for travel, most like to sample local food.)
这个地方的饮食___了浓厚的地域特色，跟其他地方完全不同。(This place's cuisine carries strong regional characteristics, completely different from other places.)

explanation.en: The verb 有 (have) must come before its object 食欲 (appetite): 有食欲 (not 食欲有).
explanation.ko: 동사 '有'는 목적어 '食欲' 앞에 와야 하므로 '有食欲'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这道菜色香味俱全，让人一看就食欲有。(This dish is excellent in color, aroma, and taste.) — find the error
choices: 这道菜色香味俱全，让人一看就有食欲。
这道菜色香味俱全，让人一看就食欲有。
这道菜色香味俱全，让人食欲一看就有。
这道菜色香味俱全，让人一看有就食欲。

explanation.en: 「而且」must come at the start of the second clause, before 价格: 而且价格〜 (not 价格而且〜).
explanation.ko: 「而且」는 두 번째 절의 맨 앞, '价格' 앞에 와야 하므로 '而且价格〜'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这家餐厅不但味道好，价格而且也很实惠。(This restaurant not only tastes good, but also has affordable prices.) — find the error
choices: 这家餐厅不但味道好，而且价格也很实惠。
这家餐厅不但味道好，价格而且也很实惠。
这家餐厅不但味道好，而且也价格很实惠。
这家餐厅不但味道好，价格也而且很实惠。

explanation.en: 「才」must come before 能 (can): 才能做出 (not 能才做出).
explanation.ko: 「才」는 '能' 앞에 와야 하므로 '才能做出'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 只有掌握了正确的火候，能才做出美味的菜肴。(Only by mastering the right cooking heat can you make delicious dishes.) — find the error
choices: 只有掌握了正确的火候，才能做出美味的菜肴。
只有掌握了正确的火候，能才做出美味的菜肴。
只有掌握了正确的火候，才做出能美味的菜肴。
只有掌握了正确的火候，能做出才美味的菜肴。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这道菜色香味俱全，让人一看就有食欲 ("This dish is excellent in color, aroma, and taste, makes you hungry just looking at it").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这道菜色香味俱全，让人一看就有食欲' (이 요리는 색·향·맛이 모두 뛰어나 보기만 해도 식욕이 생긴다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这道菜色香味俱全，__________。(This dish is excellent in color, aroma, and taste, makes you hungry just looking at it.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这家餐厅不但味道好，而且价格也很实惠 ("This restaurant not only tastes good, but also has affordable prices").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这家餐厅不但味道好，而且价格也很实惠' (이 식당은 맛도 좋을 뿐만 아니라 가격도 합리적이다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这家餐厅不但味道好，__________也很实惠。(This restaurant not only tastes good, but also has affordable prices.)
